clusters.summary: Runtime path selection and JSONL scanner fixes were localized and regression-tested across config, routing, session, telemetry, workflow, and memory.
clusters.recommendedAction: Apply the patches and keep the new regression tests.

clusters.summary: Team-run now reports final-wave partial failure instead of silently succeeding.
clusters.recommendedAction: Keep the failure-propagation fix and the main/wave regression tests.

clusters.summary: Bridge socket path selection now guards against Unix pathname length failures.
clusters.recommendedAction: Keep the short-path fallback and the long-path regression test.

clusters.summary: Command-side cache containment and remaining UI/archive JSONL readers were fixed and regression-tested.
clusters.recommendedAction: Keep the path-safe cache filename, enlarged aggregate scanner, and enlarged TUI telemetry scanner with their regressions.
